headline: $1.54 Bn Paint Protection Films Market Analysis by Type, System, Finish Type, End-use Industry, and Region - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The global paint protection films market is poised for significant growth, expanding from USD 1.09 billion in 2025 to USD 1.54 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 7.2%. Technological advancements in film materials and coatings, including self-healing thermoplastic polyurethane, are driving this growth by improving durability and optical clarity. Additionally, the polyvinyl chloride segment serves cost-sensitive markets with robust demand. The electrical & electronics industry is a burgeoning segment,
